creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lippe       2008-06-14 08:48:16 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    korean               Makefile 
  Added files:
    korean/ko.TeX-fonts-extra Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  ko.TeX is a collection of LaTeX packages made by Koaunghi Un, Dohyun Kim
  and Kangsoo Kim to replace HLaTeX and Hangul-ucs.
  
  ko.TeX-fonts-extra contains extra fonts.
  
  WWW: http://project.ktug.or.kr/ko.TeX/
  
  PR:             ports/119427
  Submitted by:   Hyogeol Lee <hyogeollee@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    gabor (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.132     +1 -0      ports/korean/Makefile
  1.1       +48 -0     ports/korean/ko.TeX-fonts-extra/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/korean/ko.TeX-fonts-extra/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/korean/ko.TeX-fonts-extra/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7110 -0   ports/korean/ko.TeX-fonts-extra/pkg-plist (new)
